'''Mol Luxu''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Daca/Legends|Daca]] in the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]]. Located in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a rocky [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]].
